question: Want to be on the waitlist?
answer:
94	What is the optimal validator count for decentralization?	We balance for performance and safety. 48 validators currently. Enough?
95	Can I stake with a leverage multiplier?	No, we don't offer leveraged staking. Too risky. Clear?
96	Do you support staking for institutional clients only?	Yes, minimum $100k. Smaller amounts use Starter program. Want to check eligibility?
97	What is the maximum ETH I can stake?	No maximum. Large stakes welcome. Want to stake 10,000 ETH?
98	Do you offer MEV smoothing for SOL?	Yes, standard feature. All stakers benefit equally. Fair?
99	Can I stake from a multisig wallet?	No, custody required. Withdraw to multisig after staking. Clear?
100	How are staking rewards taxed in your system?	We report gross rewards. You handle tax. Want to export your reward history?
💡 10. Strategische Asset Allocatie
Voor family offices en vermogensbeheerders.

#	Question	Answer
101	What is the recommended crypto allocation for a family office?	1-5% of portfolio. Depends on risk appetite. Want a consultation?
102	Do you offer model portfolios?	Yes, for institutional clients. Conservative, balanced, aggressive. Want the factsheets?
103	Can you manage my crypto allocation directly?	No, execution-only. We provide tools, you decide. Clear?
104	What is the correlation of BTC to equities?	Currently low. Diversification benefit. Want the historical correlation data?
105	Do you offer hedging products?	Yes, via OTC options (by request). Want a quote for a put option?
106	What is the Sharpe ratio of your staking product?	Approximately 1.2 over last 2 years. Better than most bonds. Want the calculation?
107	Can I allocate part of my endowment to your platform?	Yes, many endowments do. Minimum $500k. Want a proposal?
108	What is the historical volatility of ETH staking returns?	Low, around 5%. Much lower than price volatility. Good for income, right?
109	Do you offer sustainable/ESG crypto investments?	Yes, using energy-efficient validators. Want the ESG report?
110	Can I set up a recurring buy for DCA?	Yes, daily, weekly, monthly. Want to set up a recurring order?
